name: ai-agent-playbook
description: Reusable AI agent skills, project playbook templates, and a small operator-controlled runtime harness.

scripts.check: node --check bin/ai-playbook.mjs && node --check src/cli.mjs && node --check src/harness.mjs && node --check src/adapter-readiness.mjs && node --check src/operator-diagnostics.mjs && node --check src/skills-lifecycle.mjs && node --check adapters/shared/context-hook.mjs && node --check adapters/shared/package-shell.mjs && node --check adapters/codex/hook.mjs && node --check adapters/codex/package.mjs && node --check adapters/claude-code/hook.mjs && node --check adapters/claude-code/package.mjs
